antikenfestspiele-2026.title: Trier Antikenfestspiele 2026 (Classical Antiquity Festival)
antikenfestspiele-2026.intro: The Antikenfestspiele turn the Roman amphitheater into Germany's largest open-air ancient-world stage every summer. Stagings with live music, horse riders, and thousands of spectators under the open sky.
antikenfestspiele-2026.description: Trier Antikenfestspiele 2026: dates, program, and hotel availability. Performances in the Roman amphitheater, tickets, and nearby hotels.
antikenfestspiele-2026.longDesc: The Trier Antikenfestspiele is Germany's largest classical antiquity festival. Since 1998, the Roman amphitheater has been transformed each summer into an open-air stage for tragedies, comedies, and concert stagings. Tickets from around €25, with the main performances running in July and August.

olewiger-weinfest-2026.title: Olewiger Weinfest 2026 (Olewig Wine Festival)
olewiger-weinfest-2026.intro: The largest wine festival in the region. Seven days of Riesling and Elbling, open winery courtyards, the parade on Sunday, and the crowning of the Trier Wine Queen.
olewiger-weinfest-2026.description: Olewiger Weinfest 2026: dates, program, and hotel availability in Olewig (a wine village within Trier) and the city center. Sunday parade and Wine Queen crowning.
olewiger-weinfest-2026.longDesc: The Olewiger Weinfest is the largest wine festival in the Trier area. For a full week the winery courtyards stay open, the big parade winds through Olewig on the first Sunday in August, and the Trier Wine Queen is crowned. Thousands of visitors taste their way through Olewig's Riesling vineyards.

weihnachtsmarkt-2026.title: Trier Weihnachtsmarkt 2026 (Christmas Market)
weihnachtsmarkt-2026.intro: One of Germany's most beautiful Christmas markets. Stalls on the Hauptmarkt (the main market square) and in front of the cathedral, a medieval backdrop, mulled wine, and a Roman-flavored Christmas atmosphere.
weihnachtsmarkt-2026.description: Trier Christmas Market 2026: dates, program, and hotels in the city center. The most picturesque Advent setting, framed by the cathedral and the Hauptmarkt.
weihnachtsmarkt-2026.longDesc: The Trier Christmas Market spreads between the Hauptmarkt and the Domfreihof, between the market cross and the Romanesque cathedral facade. Around 95 stalls, handcrafts, Trier specialties, and Mosel mulled wine. Open from late November until just before Christmas.

altstadtfest-2026.title: Trier Altstadtfest 2026 (Old Town Festival)
altstadtfest-2026.intro: Three days of city festival with stages on the Hauptmarkt, Kornmarkt, and by the cathedral. Live music, food and drink, and free guided city tours.
altstadtfest-2026.description: Trier Altstadtfest 2026: program, dates, and hotels in Trier. Three days of open-air city festival in the UNESCO old town.
altstadtfest-2026.longDesc: The Trier Altstadtfest is the biggest inner-city festival of the year: three days of stage programming, free concerts, regional food and drink, and special tours through the UNESCO sites.

brot-und-spiele-2026.title: Brot und Spiele 2026 (Bread and Circuses Roman Festival)
brot-und-spiele-2026.intro: Trier goes Roman for a weekend. Gladiator combat in the amphitheater, a legionary camp, ancient crafts, and a costume parade.
brot-und-spiele-2026.description: Brot und Spiele (Bread and Circuses): Trier's Roman festival 2026. Gladiator show in the amphitheater, an antiquity-themed street fair, and hotel tips.
brot-und-spiele-2026.longDesc: Brot und Spiele is Trier's biggest Roman festival. The amphitheater becomes the stage for gladiator combat and equestrian shows, while legionaries camp in the city center alongside ancient markets and craftspeople.

mosel-wein-nachts-bummel-2026.title: Mosel-Wein-Nachts-Bummel 2026 (Moselle Wine Night Stroll)
mosel-wein-nachts-bummel-2026.intro: A summer night along Trier's Moselle promenade. Regional wine stalls, live music, and light art along the riverside walk.
mosel-wein-nachts-bummel-2026.description: Trier Mosel-Wein-Nachts-Bummel 2026: date, program, and hotels close to the Moselle.
mosel-wein-nachts-bummel-2026.longDesc: The Mosel-Wein-Nachts-Bummel transforms Trier's Moselle promenade into a summer-night wine mile. Wineries from across the region present their wines at open stands, with live music carrying the evening through to midnight.

stadtmuseen-lange-nacht-2026.title: Trier Lange Nacht der Museen 2026 (Long Night of Museums)
stadtmuseen-lange-nacht-2026.intro: One night, every museum open. From the Rheinisches Landesmuseum (Regional Archaeological Museum) and the Karl-Marx-Haus (Karl Marx's birthplace) to the Spielzeugmuseum (Toy Museum). Shuttle bus included.
stadtmuseen-lange-nacht-2026.description: Trier Long Night of Museums 2026: program, tickets, and all museums connected by shuttle bus.
stadtmuseen-lange-nacht-2026.longDesc: The Long Night of Trier's Museums opens every municipal and church-run museum on a single combined ticket. Special guided tours, live programming, and a shuttle service between venues.

silvester-2026.title: Hotels in Trier for New Year's Eve 2026/27
silvester-2026.intro: New Year's Eve between Porta Nigra (the Black Gate) and the Moselle: Trier with an ancient backdrop, fireworks over the Hauptmarkt, and late-night wine bars. Current hotel prices and availability for the turn of the year.
silvester-2026.description: New Year's Eve in Trier 2026/27: live hotel prices between Porta Nigra and the Moselle. Roman backdrop, Christmas market running until December 28, and New Year's parties in the brewpubs and wine bars.
silvester-2026.longDesc: Trier on New Year's Eve is a quieter alternative to Köln or Berlin: no mass tourism, but plenty of Mosel wine, wine bars, and an ancient backdrop. The Christmas market closes around December 28, and the city center stays festively lit afterward. On New Year's Eve itself, the Hauptmarkt comes alive with live music and fireworks over the Konstantinbasilika (Constantine's Basilica).

pfingsten-2026.title: Hotels in Trier for Pentecost 2026
pfingsten-2026.intro: Pentecost in Trier: a three-day long weekend with reliable weather, perfect for UNESCO sightseeing and the Moselle cycle path. Live hotel prices for the long weekend.
pfingsten-2026.description: Hotels in Trier for Pentecost 2026: a three-day long weekend with the Moselle cycle path, the lead-up to the Antikenfestspiele, and the UNESCO world heritage sites. Live prices.
pfingsten-2026.longDesc: Pentecost is Trier's most weather-reliable weekend season. The Moselle cycle path, wine hikes in Olewig, and the full UNESCO heritage in three days, without the Antikenfestspiele crowds. Pentecost Monday often brings free city tours.

himmelfahrt-2026.title: Hotels in Trier for Ascension Day 2026
himmelfahrt-2026.intro: Ascension Day long weekend in Trier: four days of the Moselle cycle path, UNESCO world heritage, and early-season wine tasting in Olewig. Live hotel prices.
himmelfahrt-2026.description: Ascension Day 2026 in Trier: four days straight thanks to the bridge-day Friday. Live hotel prices and travel tips for the May long weekend.
himmelfahrt-2026.longDesc: Ascension Day, combined with the bridge-day Friday, gives you four days straight. May is the most weather-reliable season for Moselle cycle tours and Olewig wine hikes, with fresh Riesling shoots emerging and the vineyards open for walking.

fronleichnam-2026.title: Hotels in Trier for Corpus Christi 2026
fronleichnam-2026.intro: Corpus Christi in Trier: a four-day long weekend with a full bishop's-city program, the lead-up to the Altstadtfest, and the Moselle promenade.
fronleichnam-2026.description: Corpus Christi 2026 in Trier: hotels for the Catholic long weekend. A bishop's city with a procession, the Moselle promenade, and early-summer wine bars.
fronleichnam-2026.longDesc: Trier is a bishop's city, so Corpus Christi is a genuine feast day here, with a procession through the city center. The Trier Altstadtfest often kicks off on the stages around the Hauptmarkt right afterward. Four days straight, with ideal weather.

tag-der-deutschen-einheit-2026.title: Hotels in Trier for German Unity Day 2026
tag-der-deutschen-einheit-2026.intro: October 3 in Trier: a warm, golden Mosel fall, the grape harvest underway in Olewig, with the Long Night of Museums following on October 10.
tag-der-deutschen-einheit-2026.description: German Unity Day 2026 in Trier: hotels for the long weekend, paired with the Olewig grape harvest and golden October along the Moselle.
tag-der-deutschen-einheit-2026.longDesc: October 3 falls on a Saturday in 2026, so it is a perfect Mosel trip without any bridge-day juggling. The Olewig grape harvest is in full swing, the weather is often golden-brown, and the Long Night of Museums follows on October 10.

ostern-2026.title: Hotels in Trier for Easter 2026
ostern-2026.intro: Easter in Trier: four days of bishop's-city programming, the Easter procession in the cathedral, and the first wine bars reopening in Olewig.
ostern-2026.description: Easter 2026 in Trier: hotels for the four-day long weekend. Good Friday in the cathedral, the Easter procession, and the early Mosel season.
ostern-2026.longDesc: Trier is a bishop's city, so the Good Friday liturgy and the Easter procession in the cathedral are remarkable experiences. Olewig usually opens its wine bars for the first time after the winter break during this week.

wochenende.title: Hotels for a Weekend in Trier
wochenende.intro: Trier next weekend? Here are the current live prices for the classic two-night program between Porta Nigra (the Black Gate) and the Moselle.
wochenende.description: Hotels in Trier for a weekend, live prices. The UNESCO must-sees, the Moselle promenade, and Olewig in two nights.
wochenende.longDesc: The classic Trier weekend: arrive Friday evening, UNESCO tour on Saturday, Olewig or the Moselle cycle path on Sunday, and head home Sunday afternoon. Here you can see prices and availability for the next available weekend.
